seoTitle: Pental Island vs Percydale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pental Island and Percydale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pental Island vs Percydale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pental Island and Percydale.
heading: Pental Island vs Percydale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pental Island, Victoria and Percydale, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Percydale has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Pental Island (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pental Island or Percydale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pental Island has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Percydale scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pental Island scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Percydale scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pental Island or Percydale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Percydale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
